title: 15 Reports
body_text:
15	Reports
15.1	Overview of Reports
Reports associated with
PaymentStream
ГўВ„Вў
AFT are grouped into the following categories:
PaymentStream
AFT Reports
ГўВҖВ“ Generated from data that users enter on or upload to
PaymentStream
AFT.
PaymentStream
Direct Reports for AFT
ГўВҖВ“ Generated by authorized financial institution users (e.g., AFT Originator ID Listing Report, Deleted AFT Originator ID Report, AFT Forecast Report).
Central 1 Reports
ГўВҖВ“ Used to view information about processed AFT transactions (e.g., settlement information for successfully validated AFT files, rejected transactions, recalls). Financial institutions download these reports from the File and Report Exchange. Business members download these reports from
PaymentStream
AFT.
15.2	Accessing PaymentStream AFT Reports
All Originators have access to
PaymentStream
AFT reports that are generated from data entered on or uploaded to
PaymentStream
AFT. Users can view
PaymentStream
AFT reports for any Originator ID to which they have access. For procedures on accessing
PaymentStream
AFT reports, see the following:
PaymentStream
AFT ГўВҖВ“ Guide for Automatic Release, Form 5598
PaymentStream
AFT ГўВҖВ“ Guide for Manual Release, Form 5599
PaymentStream
AFT ГўВҖВ“ Guide for File Upload, Form 5600
The data entered on or uploaded to
PaymentStream
AFT is purged after a certain time. Once the data is deleted from
PaymentStream
AFT, it wonГўВҖВҷt appear in the
PaymentStream
AFT reports. See Section 13.2, Purge Schedule for
PaymentStream
AFT Transactions.
15.3	Accessing AFT Reports in PaymentStream Direct
Authorized financial institution users have access to additional AFT reports in
PaymentStream
Direct. To access these reports, authorized users proceed as follows:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
, then select
Production Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
PaymentStream Direct
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Figure 3: Accessing PaymentStream Direct
ГўВ‘
Select the
Administration
tab.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Select
Reports
in the navigation menu.
ГўВ‘Вў
Select a report from the drop-down menu. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Accessing Reports in PaymentStream Direct
15.4	AFT Originator ID Listing Report
The AFT Originator ID Listing Report shows a list of all Originator IDs with information that is associated to their financial institution. This report is available to all financial institution users who have access to
PaymentStream
AFT.
An authorized user proceeds as follows to create an AFT Originator ID Listing Report:
Go to the Reports page as described in Section 15.3, Accessing AFT Reports in
PaymentStream
Direct.
Complete the Reports page as follows. See Figure 5.
ГўВ‘
Select
AFT Originator ID Listing Report
from the drop-down menu.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Select the Currency Type.
ГўВ‘Вў
Select the check box if you want to organize the results by branch.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Select
Create Report
.
Figure 5: Creating an AFT Originator ID Listing Report
The AFT Originator ID Listing Report can be printed or exported to PDF or CSV. See Figure 6.
Note:	The CSV listing includes the Last File Creation Date for each Originator ID. You can use the information in this column to determine when originators last used their Originator ID and flag those coming up to 12 months of inactivity. Central 1 deletes Originator IDs that are inactive on
PaymentStream
AFT for more than 12 months.
Figure 6: Originator ID Listing Report Details
15.5	Deleted AFT Originator ID Report
The Deleted AFT Originator ID Report displays a list of your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs deleted Originator IDs. The report includes both financial institution and business member Originator IDs. This report is available to all financial institution users who have access to
PaymentStream
AFT.
An authorized user proceeds as follows to create a Deleted AFT Originator ID report:
Go to the Reports page as described in Section 15.3, Accessing AFT Reports in
PaymentStream
Direct.
Complete the Reports page as follows. See Figure 7.
ГўВ‘
Select
Deleted AFT Originator ID Report
from the drop-down menu.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Select the Currency Type.
ГўВ‘Вў
Select the check box if you want to organize the results by branch.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Select
Create Report
.
Figure 7: Creating a Deleted AFT Originator ID Report
The Deleted AFT Originator ID Report can be printed or exported to PDF or CSV. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Deleted AFT Originator ID Report Details
15.6	AFT Forecast Report
The AFT Forecast Report provides a listing of AFT settlement values scheduled for processing to AFT originatorsГўВҖВҷ accounts.
The report offers an advance view of projected AFT settlement to your financial institution and business membersГўВҖВҷ accounts. The report includes debit and credit settlement values up to the next seven calendar days. The settlement predictions are based on AFT activity generated by your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs AFT originators, including AFT transactions that have been approved and those that are pending approval.
An authorized user proceeds as follows to create an AFT Forecast Report:
Go to the Reports page as described in Section 15.3, Accessing AFT Reports in
PaymentStream
Direct.
Complete the Reports page as follows. See Figure 9.
ГўВ‘
Select
AFT Forecast Report
from the drop-down menu.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Select the Originator Type.
ГўВ‘Вў
If Business Originator, select the name of the business.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Select the Currency Type.
ГўВ‘ВӨ
Select the check box if you want to organize the results by branch.
ГўВ‘ВҘ
Select
Create Report
.
Figure 9: Creating an AFT Forecast Report
The AFT Forecast Report can be printed or exported to PDF or CSV. See Figure 10.
Figure 10: AFT Forecast Report Details
15.7	Central 1 Reports
Information about processed AFT transactions (e.g., settlement information for successfully validated AFT files, rejected transactions, recalls) is available in the MERG file. Financial institutions can download these reports from Central 1 via the File and Report Exchange. Business members can download these reports from
PaymentStream
AFT. For more information on AFT settlement reports, see the AFT Reports Part. For more information on settlement, see the AFT Settlement Part and the AFT Rejects, Recalls, Error Corrections, and Other Exception Items Part.
END
